extortion.description: [AI generated] Proactive Engineering Consultants is a proficient and effective professional service firm that provides a wide range of engineering solutions. Offering services in the areas of civil, structural, and stormwater engineering, as well as land surveying, they are committed to applying sound, progressive thinking to each project. Renowned for their client-focused approach, they aim to apply a forward-thinking and collaborative strategy, ensuring high-quality results.
